login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Enter your admin password to continue.

setup.title: Set up admin password
setup.description: Choose a password to protect your Tachibana instance.
setup.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

password.title: Admin Password
password.description: Reset your admin password. This will log you out of other sessions. MCP & Skills Clients are kept intact.
password.dialogDescription: All existing sessions will be logged out.
password.newPasswordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the Web UI.

linkDevice.title: Link an iPhone or iPad
linkDevice.usbInstruction: First, connect an iPhone or iPad via USB cable.
linkDevice.chooseDevice: Then, choose a device to link

signIn.title: Sign in Apple Account
signIn.accountNote: Any account would work, it is not affiliated with iCloud.
signIn.privacyNote: Credentials are only shared with Apple and stored on your host device. You can sign out at any time to clear them.

twoFa.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFa.descriptionWithType: Enter the verification code sent via {{type}}.

notFound.title: Device not found
notFound.description: This device is not registered. Make sure it's connected and linked.

notLinked.title: Device not linked
notLinked.description: {{deviceName}} needs to be linked before use.

deviceScreen.defaultError: Could not start screen. Make sure the device is connected.
deviceScreen.firstTimeHint: If it's first time using this device, you need to follow steps below to set it up.

trustCertificate.title: Trust developer certificate
trustCertificate.description: In Settings → General → VPN & Device Management, trust {{email}}.

developerMode.title: Enable Developer Mode
developerMode.description: In Settings → Privacy & Security → Developer Mode, turn on Developer Mode and restart when prompted.

controlPanel.typeHint: Type here to send keys to device...

agents.title: MCP & Skills
agents.description: Enable access for your favorite LLM agents.
agents.noAgents: No agent yet. Register one to get started.

renameDialog.title: Rename agent
renameDialog.description: Enter a new name for this agent.

createDialog.title: Register your agent
createDialog.description: Next, you will be taken to setup your agent.

setupDialog.title: Setup your agent
setupDialog.description: This window includes your secret key — it will only be shown once. Keep it open until finishing the setup.
setupDialog.agentSkillDescription: Works with OpenClaw and more latest agents, providing atomic operations over devices.
setupDialog.agentSkillHint: Search the web if you don't know what to do with your agent.
setupDialog.mcpDescription: Add this JSON snippet to your MCP client configuration.
setupDialog.saveToken: Or save the token for later...

authRequired.title: Apple Account required
authRequired.description: You need to sign in with an Apple Account to link a device to the developer portal.

trustModal.title: Trust this computer
trustModal.description: Unlock {{deviceName}} and tap Trust when prompted on the device.
